creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #4)
> (In reply to Jan Beich from comment #3)
> > It appears I have bug 78787 applied and <time.h> part is causing the issue.
> 
> Uh, how do you draw that conclusion?

After looking through local patches while testing showed

  empty make.conf  - affected
  empty environ(7) - affected
  emtpy /usr/local - affected

  poudriere jail   - unaffected

poudriere confirmed local kernel patches didn't matter so I've started from those applied to rtld, libc or /usr/include until it failed there with minimal changes.

> 
> 
> >   lang/clang33        - unaffected
> >   clang 3.3 in base   - unaffacted
> >   clang 3.4.1 in base - unaffected
> >   lang/clang34        - unaffected
> >   lang/clang35        - affected
> >   clang350-import     - affected
> >   lang/clang-devel    - affected
> >   lang/gcc49          - unaffected
> > 
> >   lang/perl5.16       - affected
> >   lang/perl5.18       - affected
> >   lang/perl5.20       - affected
> > 
> >   CFLAGS += -O0       - affected
> >   patched poudriere jail - affected
> > 
> > likely by the following snippet
> > 
> > #ifdef CLK_TCK
> >         {
> >             IV temp0;
> >             temp0 = CLK_TCK;
> >             abort();
> >             constant_add_symbol(aTHX_  symbol_table, "CLK_TCK",
> >                                     7, newSViv(temp0));
> >         }
> > #endif
> 
> And how do you end up thinking that this is the cause?  Is there any
> explanation beyond this? :-)

After a lot of testing to debug my environment. As part of it I wanted to see what code ext/POSIX/Makefile.PL generates. Trying to use |temp0 = 128| or |temp0 = sysconf(3)| in the code helped. This suggested clang miscompiles it only when __weak_reference happens.

or

(lldb) f 1
frame #1: 0x000000080260cf88 POSIX.so`boot_POSIX(cv=0x000000080215f810) + 7448 at const-xs.inc:1140
   1137 #ifdef CLK_TCK
   1138         {
   1139             IV temp0;
-> 1140             temp0 = CLK_TCK;
   1141             constant_add_symbol(aTHX_  symbol_table, "CLK_TCK",
   1142                                     7, newSViv(temp0));
   1143         }
